name: No More Enemies
short_description: Gather souls through 13 deadly waves to honor the godly oath you took ! No More Enemies is a roguelike platformer where each game is different. Focus on your movements and let your weapons do the killing for you !
detailed_description:
Gather souls through 13 deadly waves to honor the godly oath you took ! 

No More Enemies is a roguelike platformer where each game is different. Focus on your movements and let your weapons do the killing for you !                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Advance in the game by killing every enemy on each level, navigating through hazards and dangers. 

You will encounter power-ups to help, but so will your enemies…

Be fast to get more rewards ! But not too much, Precipitation usually leads to a swift game over.

Experience the bullet heaven atmosphere mixed with the joy of sharp movements.

CONTENT

  • Moving Maze: Enjoy platforming within recognisable handcrafted chunks, randomly placed to create a new layout everytime !

  • MidWave Shopping: Use your collected resources to acquire Artifacts that shape your gameplay and/or invest in your core Statistics to get purely stronger.

  • Build your own Challenge: Choose your Upgrades each wave, but as you get stronger,
    so do your enemies ! Pick wisely, your success depends on it ~

  • Adjustable Difficulty: Play with multiple Trial Levels, each adding new rules to spice
    things up, strengthening the enemies as well !

  • Variable Playstyles: Customize your experience with 3 champions, each having 3 unique weapons, 4 different movement skills to unlock and a multitude of skins to try out !
